## Source: ossf-package-analysis (62052c32a08bc8af05a1012fc5a5e9b63a09eea906ff0affeeef77f4604b70ec)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-modelsgateway-telemetry' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
